build.buildCommand: npm install && ldconfig && npm run build && curl -fsSL https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && yt-dlp --version && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium && echo 'Playwright Chromium installed'
